testcase.name: register_missingName_returns400
testcase.system-out:
14:26:15.655 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.restaurant.integration.AuthControllerIntegrationTest]: AuthControllerIntegrationTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 14:26:15.910 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.restaurant.RestaurantApplication for test class com.restaurant.integration.AuthControllerIntegrationTest
